rationale: The only resume change shortened the career gap from open-ended ('PRESENT') to a closed window ending OCTOBER 2025. Both evaluations land on the identical score of 6/10. The differences in wording — the variant crediting some Java experience while raising new concerns about JVM tooling and recent full-stack focus — do not key off the gap timing in any age- or recency-penalizing way; they read as ordinary run-to-run reformulation of the same lukewarm assessment. No concern was added that proxies for the gap's duration or the candidate's likely employment status, and the score is unchanged.
